description: Capability registry for the ROWS system. Maps capabilities to preferred workers, common roles, and expected evidence.

goal-decomposition.description: Break a project goal into discrete, claimable tasks
goal-decomposition.evidence_expected: Task files in backlog/, handoff summarizing decomposition

project-planning.description: Plan project phases, milestones, and task ordering
project-planning.evidence_expected: Roadmap, milestone definitions, dependency map updates

architecture-planning.description: Design system architecture and make technology decisions
architecture-planning.evidence_expected: ADRs, system overview diagrams, tech stack decisions

research.description: Research technologies, patterns, and external information
research.evidence_expected: Research log entries, comparison tables, recommendations with citations

code-implementation.evidence_expected: Working code, passing tests, code review approval

frontend-implementation.description: Build UI components, styles, and client-side logic

backend-implementation.description: Build APIs, services, database schemas, and server logic
backend-implementation.evidence_expected: Working API, passing integration tests, API documentation

test-writing.description: Write unit, integration, and end-to-end tests
test-writing.evidence_expected: Test files, test output showing pass/fail counts

ui-browser-verification.description: Verify UI behavior in a browser environment

mcp-tool-use.description: Use MCP servers safely for scoped tool access and resource reads
mcp-tool-use.evidence_expected: Validated MCP config, notes on scoped server usage

mcp-resource-read.description: Read MCP resources without granting write access

prompt-safety.description: Evaluate external content and fetched instructions for prompt-injection risk
prompt-safety.evidence_expected: Safety review notes, confirmation of repo-policy precedence

worktree-management.description: Set up and maintain git worktrees for parallel execution
worktree-management.evidence_expected: Worktree path, branch name, clean isolation evidence

scaffolding.description: Initialize or scaffold a fork from template inputs
scaffolding.evidence_expected: Generated project settings and replaced placeholders

coordination.description: Coordinate multi-worker efforts and task routing
coordination.evidence_expected: Coordination proposals, status reports, queue audits

release-review.evidence_expected: Review report, approval or change requests

security-review.description: Review code and architecture for security vulnerabilities
security-review.evidence_expected: Security review report, identified issues, remediation recommendations

refactoring.description: Improve code structure without changing external behavior
refactoring.evidence_expected: Refactored code, all existing tests still passing

debugging.description: Find and fix bugs in existing code
debugging.evidence_expected: Bug fix, regression test, verification that bug is resolved

task-decomposition.description: Break work into claimable task files
task-decomposition.evidence_expected: Task files in backlog/, dependency annotations

repo-navigation.evidence_expected: Correct identification of files to modify

file-editing.description: Create, modify, and delete files in the repository
file-editing.evidence_expected: Changed files with clear commit messages

handoff-writing.description: Write clear, actionable handoff files for continuity

evidence-production.description: Produce verifiable evidence of task completion
evidence-production.evidence_expected: Test output, screenshots, logs, verification reports
